pluginManager.title: Program and Plugin Manager
pluginManager.pluginDesc: List of installed and correctly loaded plugins. You can enable, disable, or uninstall plugins here.
pluginManager.dependencyDesc: List of internal dependencies required for the program to run. You can view the version and related information for each dependency here.
pluginManager.deactivatedDesc: The following items are disabled plugin IDs. Since the program does not load them, detailed information cannot be displayed. Click the Remove button to re-enable them.
pluginManager.changed: You have modified the disabled status of some plugins. A program restart is required to apply these changes. Auto-restart is not currently supported. Please manually restart the application later.

configWidget.restartRequiredDesc: Some settings on this page require a full program restart to take effect. Please manually restart the program later to apply these settings.
